creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #15)

Sorry, this device does not support recording :(

You mean the "Value" of uaudio_chan_play_callback?  It seems to be strongly related to the input samplerate.

file            file samplerate   vchanrate
dmesg-2.log      48000             48000
dmesg-4.8k.log   44100             48000
dmesg-19.2k.log  48000             192000
